# Commander
> Production-grade multi-agent orchestration engine.

Commander classifies tasks, picks a topology (SINGLE/CHAIN/DISPATCH/ORCHESTRATOR/REVIEW), runs agents with tools, and streams every decision with quality gates.

## Docs
- https://pstarh.github.io/commander-docs/
- https://pstarh.github.io/commander-docs/guide/getting-started.html
- https://pstarh.github.io/commander-docs/guide/why-commander.html
- https://pstarh.github.io/commander-docs/guide/cookbook/
- https://pstarh.github.io/commander-docs/architecture/overview.html
- https://pstarh.github.io/commander-docs/api/overview.html
- https://pstarh.github.io/commander-docs/guide/security.html

## Source
- https://github.com/PStarH/Commander

## Key facts
- 25 LLM providers with auto-failover
- 5 canonical topologies
- 18 built-in tools
- 6700+ tests
- MIT license
